title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Lombard

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at ICICI Lombard
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, ICICI Lombard in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Lombard:
ICICI Lombard is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Lombard!
